title: Exact Finite Spectral Linear Algebra Checks

solver_reuse.target: spectral linear algebra bad eigenpair QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact matrix-vector replay computes eigen_image_0 = 3, but the malformed row claims the same component is 2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional fixed spectral rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep general spectral theorems, compact-operator theory, and numerical eigenvalue algorithms in Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed eigenpair, Rayleigh quotient, and spectral-decomposition claims as deterministic exact-rational obligations.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation over finite matrices.
Route false finite eigenpair rows through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence once exact replay computes the conflicting component.
Add characteristic-polynomial and interval-eigenvalue checks before claiming broader spectral coverage.
Keep general spectral theorems, compact-operator theory, and numerical eigenvalue algorithms marked Lean/numerical horizon.
